text_block_list.text:
One day, while Smart Falcon and I are having a
training meeting in my office...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hello, hello! Special delivery! I've got a fan letter
for Falco!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wow! A fan letter! For me?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Not only that, it was super nice of you to come all
the way here just to give it to me. Thanks! ☆

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You're welcome! But actually, I work part-time as
a mail carrier.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I use an app so I can work only when I have free
time. That way, it doesn't interfere with my other
part-time jobs or training!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wow! You're working really hard, Ines!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I want to give back to my family for all
their support.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm off to my next delivery. Congrats again
on the fan letter!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I'm gonna read the letter right now!

With a serious expression on her face, Smart
Falcon opens the letter and begins to read it
where she stands.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Thank you for waiting, Trainer. I'm all finished.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...That my smile gives them lots of energy.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And that they'll always be rooting for me. And to
keep up the good work.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! I'm definitely gonna become a top
Umadol!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna show everyone who always supports me
the cutest Falco there is!
